Docs IA restructure

From the docs-UX brainstorm (2026-07-17): the 192 generated reference pages (70% of the site) swamped the sidebar and buried hand-written content. Structural fix, native Fumadocs, no eject.

Before

  • One tree, 273 pages at comparable visual weight
  • guides/ missing from root meta — 5 pages auto-appended at the tail
  • Showcase (the Lab) buried under "Help"
  • Reference folders expanded, endless scroll

After

  • Reference = its own root tab ("root": true) — main sidebar drops to ~45 curated items
  • ...guides explicitly placed under Guides
  • Showcase promoted to its own section
  • defaultOpen: false on skills/agents/hooks reference folders
  • nav-structure.test.ts guards all of the above in CI

Interactive playground

The full decision playground for this overhaul (options, scores, devil's advocate) shipped earlier at docs/embed-fix-options/ + the brainstorm record in the PR body. This page is the structural before/after note.
